font.geometry: Embedded 95-glyph Blender-extracted BlurMedium Regular outline atlas

validation: The recovered Blurmed.ttf was loaded in Blender and its glyph outlines were extracted into the portable dump. Blender 5 leaves the legacy animated instances-to-Fill-Curve path empty, so the reference harness explicitly realizes the glyphs and materializes the frame-240 typed string. Both engines generate the same 33 filled glyph faces; browser outline sampling is denser and its word wrapping remains different.
